name: Maple Walnut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the egg and sugar in a bowl, beating well.
2. Add the remaining ingredients; mix until combined.
3. Spread evenly in a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
5. Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into bars or squares.
